description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a glossy, dark chocolate ganache coating that drips slightly over the sides. The top is decorated with evenly spaced swirls of white whipped cream, each piped in a circular motion, and a single bright red cherry placed at the center. Pink sprinkles are scattered generously across the top surface, adding a festive and colorful touch. The cake appears dense and moist, with a smooth, slightly domed top. The sides are uniformly covered in chocolate, and the overall finish is neat and polished. No candles or additional decorations are present, and the cake is not displayed on any visible container or plate.
description: A round chocolate cake with glossy ganache, white whipped cream swirls, pink sprinkles, and a central red cherry. The cake is neatly decorated and has a festive appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central cherry, whipped cream swirls, and pink sprinkles on a glossy chocolate surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the even spacing of the whipped cream swirls and the smooth ganache drip along the side.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the cake's roundness, the central cherry, and the uniform distribution of decorations.
description_view_3: This side shows the consistent ganache coating and the arrangement of cream swirls and sprinkles.
